title: Galaxycraft Infinity
description: Collect mystical weapons from different worlds
body:
This mod requires Geckolib to work!!

Galaxycraft Infinity is a mod that is about adding powerfull weapons from pop-culture by traveling trough different dimensions and collecting different resources, currently the mod adds:

New Dimensions: 

The Mining Dimension (portal lighted using the glitch pickaxe which is only obtainable if crystalcraft is also installed), Neptune and Uranus (portal lighted using Ice and Uranite)
![Uranus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f9b66dca934a93f56884771057ab0db1d2b70b6.png)
![Uranus 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2825aa93c182503727dbef494a6c78ce7eae9723.png)
![portals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/558192b75518d23e401acd36e9b6307135223439.png)
 ![Ice and Uranite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c29c98b45ed1b3a6c3c401b909332be993e3b15.webp)<- made in Chrono destabilizer
 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RdecEsGIRaI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Video on how to get to the mining dimension ⬆️


New ores: Uranite (found on Uranus), Neptite found on Neptune, Grimtane (found in overworld), ancient amber (can only be found in badlands (very rarely)), glitch ore (only obtainable using matrix pickaxe from my other mod crystalcraft unlimited or the neptite/uranite pickaxe from this mod glitch ore can be found in the lowest parts of the overworld),and Blood steel found in the overworld

![all the new ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98efbd0d557df599d92d1591ebb329c05202bc6c.png)all the new ores

New crafting stations:

The quantum cube:
![quantum cube recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b65c5665509bd2aed5633e8f79080170ef55da8c.png)


The Chrono Destabilzer:
![Chrono Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a6bca501e41c719b7b1f0fe3a6596f5df35c40.png)
![Chrono Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1520d713480c7e6398692ad9d65438a198943a2d.png)





New mobs: The T-rex boss (can be spawned with its spawn egg made in the chrono destablizer recipe down below. it drops the T-rex tooth), the cobra (can spawn in deserts at night it drops its venom gland occasionally), the praying mantis (which spawns in several forest biomes), the flower mantis (a praying mantis struck by lightning it has a 10% chance of dropping its claw), the asian murder hornet (which can be found in foresty biomes has a chance to drop its stinger), the waterwolf (found on Neptune), the Zombo and snow spider found on Uranus and lastly the Eva #001 boss based on Neon Genesis Evangelion you can watch how to spawn it in this video: [https://youtu.be/XnyLpq8Cx9w?si=e2R8JMS4aV5yPOgK](https://youtu.be/XnyLpq8Cx9w?si=e2R8JMS4aV5yPOgK) ![New Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4767c562ab3139a7a66f80b03975377c2e893738.png)















drop from flower mantis ![flower claw](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2ef195167f7cb406e26b0e254c0ea0510a94130.png)

drop from asian hornet![stinger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/640da78f5d9eb70c7be98364b8dccb5a77f71354.png)

drop from cobra![venom gland](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82fcd7f9f4a0aa53cb64ddb0a8870909931b641e.png)

drop from eva boss![Eva Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd92728c9a3c155553790ba308582f440a933532.png)

drop from T-rex boss![Trex Tooth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cd03b8ec2b6808ba3a0f0b8bb0e759c564f44d6.png)

 

And most importantly the new weapons/items and their recipes (the 100 slot table is the quantum cube and the one with evolution and devolution is the chrono destabilzer:



![car recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/463cfb4a9c77ca8d3750c08d54ccd8b34fea5ed9.png)
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f34a093275462fab730d97300a12931f365aedb8.png)
And these are the recipes to make the strongest sword (without crystalcraft)![best sword recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36a8c23148b34cf081f3932d191da83e6f85c434.png)
There are also some recipes that can only be done if you also have my other mod crystalcraft unlimited installed:

the actual best sword![glitch blade recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3402f194f24a097a588c52e3684484d863e4399e.png)
![glitch pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e4bd5390c9a9b4731bb2ece62a64880919e0486.png)

New vehicles:
![ae87](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b9db941487243058a5e39a1ada899183412bde6.png)
toyota AE86 Sprinter Trueno ⬆️




If you still have any questions or suggestions for new weapons feel free to comment down below
